# gryzlees-epic-dotfiles
My dotiles.

### User config files present:

- i3wm (~/.config/i3/)
- alacritty (~/.config/alacritty/)
- picom (~/.config/picom/)
- zsh (~/.zshrc)

### Autogenerated config files:

- With LXappearance
  - ~/.config/gtk-2.0/
  - ~/.config/gtk-3.0/
  - ~/.gtkrc-2.0/
- With arandr
  - ~/.screenlayout/.screen.sh

### Resource Files:

- gtk/qt themes (.themes)
- icon/cursor themes (.icons)
- oh-my-zsh config and themes (.oh-my-zsh)
